data.title: Mouser Electronics to showcase latest tech at DesignCon 2026, Booth 1139, Santa Clara Convention Center with 1,200+ manufacturers.
data.description: In Texas, Mouser Electronics, a leading provider of New Product Introduction (NPI) solutions, is encouraging electronic design engineers to attend DesignCon 2026 from February 24 to 26 at the Santa Clara Convention Center in California. At Booth 1139, Mouser will showcase a comprehensive range of semiconductors and technologies from its extensive line card featuring more than 1,200 manufacturers. This event presents an opportunity for engineers to explore the latest innovations in the field.

data.title: Experts question drug companies targeting aging consumers in ads. Politicians propose bans after decades of debate.
data.description: An industry expert highlighted that aging individuals are increasingly becoming targets for the industry. In response to long-standing debates, politicians from various political backgrounds are now putting forth proposals for bans.

data.title: EU aims to prohibit all cryptocurrency transactions with Russian entities. Lawmakers plan to ban EU parties from using crypto with Russians to uphold sanctions.
data.description: Legislators are proposing a ban on any European Union entity engaging in transactions involving cryptocurrencies with Russian partners to aid in the enforcement of sanctions. The move aims to prevent parties within the EU from using digital currencies for dealings with Russian counterparts. The measure seeks to strengthen the enforcement of sanctions by prohibiting the use of crypto in transactions involving Russia.

data.title: FirstEnergy's earnings report to announce on 2026-02-17 with an estimated EPS of $0.53. Investors anticipate positive news for future projections.
data.description: FirstEnergy (FE) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Tuesday, February 17, 2026. Analysts predict the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.53. Shareholders await the announcement in hopes of exceeding expectations and receiving positive guidance for the next quarter. It's important for new investors to understand that stock prices can be greatly impacted by future forecasts rather than solely past performance. In the previous quarter, FirstEnergy surpassed estimates by $0.07, resulting in a 1.63% decrease in share value. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Expand Energy (NASDAQ: EXE) set to release earnings on 2026-02-17. Analysts predict EPS of $1.88. Investors hopeful for positive guidance.
data.description: Expand Energy, trading on NASDAQ under the symbol EXE, is gearing up to unveil its latest quarterly earnings report on Tuesday, February 17, 2026. Market analysts are forecasting an earnings per share (EPS) figure of $1.88 for the period. Shareholders of Expand Energy are eagerly anticipating the upcoming announcement, with hopes that the company will not only meet but exceed these projections and offer a positive outlook for the subsequent quarter. It is essential for prospective investors to recognize that stock valuations can be significantly swayed by forward-looking guidance in addition to historical performance. In the prior quarter, Expand Energy outperformed expectations, posting an EPS that was $0.09 higher than anticipated, resulting in a 0.58% decline in the company's stock value. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nexo officially returns to U.S. market in 2026 with partnership with regulated partners like Bakkt for investment and credit products.
data.description: Miami-based company Nexo has officially announced its comeback to the U.S. market in 2026. The relaunch is in partnership with regulated entities to ensure compliance with U.S. regulations for its investment and credit products. Bakkt, a U.S.-based digital asset platform, will provide the infrastructure for digital asset trading. Nexo's return marks a significant move back into the U.S. market.

data.title: SBA Communications Corp CFO to speak at Raymond James Conference on March 2, 2026 at 9:15 AM ET. Visit www.sbasite.com for audio presentation.
data.description: SBA Communications Corporation (NASDAQ: SBAC) based in Boca Raton, Florida, has disclosed that Marc Montagner, their CFO, will be presenting at the Raymond James & Associates 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 2, 2026, at 9:15 a.m. ET. The event will take place at the JW Marriott Grand Lakes in Orlando, Florida. Those interested can listen to SBA's presentation by visiting www.sbasite.com. SBA Communications Corporation is a leading company in the industry.

data.title: Racism against South Asians surges amid H-1B visa debate, echoing great replacement theory.
data.description: The discussion on the effects of visas on American workers has been marginalized by racist language, mirroring the alarming conspiracy theory known as the great replacement.

data.title: Quiet lawyer, Jamieson Greer, from a working-class background, is shaping Trump’s global trade war with major impact.
data.description: At the request of the president, Jamieson Greer, a humble attorney with roots in a working-class background, is reshaping the dynamics of the world economy.

data.title: Hyundai IONIQ 5 N named Best Performance EV - up to 641 horsepower, track-ready, new NACS port for easier charging.
data.description: The powerful IONIQ 5 N is equipped with an impressive 641 horsepower and features enhanced suspension and cooling systems for optimal track performance. The N Active Sound+ and N e-Shift technologies offer a unique and immersive driving experience not found in other electric vehicles. In 2026, the IONIQ 5 N will come with a new NACS port, making charging even more convenient. Hyundai's IONIQ model continues to push the boundaries of electric vehicle technology.

data.title: Pancreatic cancer cells' growth or resistance to chemo depends on surrounding fibers; study finds.
data.description: A recent study conducted in New York reveals that the environment surrounding pancreatic cancer cells plays a crucial role in their growth speed and resistance to chemotherapy. The findings indicate that the adaptability of these cells can lead to the development of innovative treatment methods. This new insight highlights the importance of understanding the factors influencing cancer cell behavior. The study, released on Feb. 16, 2026, emphasizes the need to explore these mechanisms further to enhance current treatment strategies. This research sheds light on the complex dynamics of cancer cells and their potential impact on treatment outcomes.

data.title: Expert Bryan Harmon provides guidance on when to DIY or seek professional help for home repairs in HelloNation.
data.description: A recent article on HelloNation discusses the dilemma faced by homeowners on whether to tackle a project themselves or seek professional help. Bryan Harmon from Ace Handyman Services in Indianapolis, Indiana, provides insights on determining the tipping point between DIY and professional assistance. The article aims to assist homeowners in making informed decisions regarding home projects.

Beijing is glowing after dark as a massive lantern show lights up the capital to welcome the Year of the Horse. Towering illuminated displays blend tradition and modern design as the city celebrates the festive season.

data.title: Lincoln Tech opens new campus in Houston, TX, providing hands-on training in four industries.
data.description: A recently established campus is now providing practical career training in four promising industries. This initiative aims to equip individuals with essential skills and knowledge required for employment in these sectors. The campus focuses on industries experiencing significant growth, such as technology, healthcare, hospitality, and finance. As part of this program, students can gain valuable experience through hands-on training and real-world scenarios. This initiative is expected to benefit a large number of individuals seeking career opportunities in these industries.

data.title: LA engineering pioneer Dave Tourjé brings Alpha Structural to Santa Barbara, offering expertise in landslide repair.
data.description: Alpha Structural, with extensive experience in landslide, foundation, and structural repair spanning several decades, is expanding its operations to Santa Barbara. This move is significant for founder Dave Tourjé as it marks a return to where his career first began. The establishment of their new office signifies a reconnection with Central Coast communities, emphasizing their commitment to providing exceptional services.

data.title: Global curved temperature monitor patch market to reach $0.9 billion by 2033 with 5.5% CAGR. North America leads market.
data.description: In the near future, there is a projected uptick in the adoption of curved temperature monitor patches due to the rising interest in continuous, non-invasive vital sign tracking and the emphasis on remote patient care. The global market for these patches is currently led by North America.

data.title: Global Carbon Accounting Software market to grow at 25.73% CAGR from 2026-2032 due to rising ESG mandates. North America holds 45% market share.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, it was reported that the Global Carbon Accounting Software Market is projected to experience a significant increase, with an estimated Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of approximately 25.73% between 2026 and 2032. North America currently holds the top position in the global market, accounting for nearly 45% of the market share. This data was derived from a market research report by MarkNtel Advisors.

data.title: Police in Wichita handle mutual domestic violence claims where both parties accuse each other of aggression, creating a complex scenario.
data.description: In Wichita, Kansas, on February 16, 2026, it was noted that cases of domestic violence are notably intricate than perceived initially. At times, both involved individuals blame each other for being the instigator, leading to a scenario often termed as a "he said, she said" situation. This highlights the complexity of such cases, where each party presents conflicting accounts of the events.
